mechanism_narrative: Sustained declines in the federal funds rate reduce the discount rate applied to equity cash flows, mechanically lifting S&P 500 valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses below 7.5% and holds for two months, it signals labor market normalization that boosts consumer spending expectations and drives positive equity returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls below 7.5% for two consecutive months
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are negative in >50% of triggered instances despite the unemployment threshold crossing.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in housing starts and retail sales indicate synchronized consumer and business confidence, which amplifies earnings revision momentum and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint proxy increases yield negative or flat 60-day forward returns in >40% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of active monetary tightening, rising industrial production indicates resilient corporate capacity utilization, which supports profit margins and generates positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO prints during rate hikes produce negative 5-day forward returns in >60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating monthly inflation prints trigger immediate repricing of discount rates and growth expectations, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: Inflation spikes >0.3% month-over-month consistently yield positive 5-day forward returns.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous payroll growth exceeding 150,000 and unemployment rate declines indicate labor market tightening that fuels wage-driven consumption, which sustains equity earnings momentum and produces positive 20-day forward returns.
failure_condition: Joint payroll gains and unemployment drops fail to generate positive 20-day forward returns in >50% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: In a low interest rate environment, rising housing starts act as a leading indicator for broader economic activity and construction-related corporate earnings, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Housing starts increases under low rates consistently produce negative 60-day forward returns.

mechanism_narrative: When the industrial production index crosses above 100, it signals peak manufacturing capacity utilization, which compresses input costs through economies of scale and generates positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO > 100 consistently correlates with negative 5-day forward returns.
